title: solanum iopetalum
intro: Solanum iopetalum, also known as the moonflower or night-scented jasmine, is a flowering plant native to Australia and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Solanum iopetalum is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving anxiety, and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of Solanum iopetalum include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
